title: acranthera parviflora
intro: Acranthera parviflora, also known as the small-flowered Acranthera, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of Acranthera parviflora are primarily based on its roots, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce pain and prevent the spread of infections. Acranthera parviflora can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat a range of health issues.
